input: streaming user-item interaction graph (data blocks arriving over time)
output: updated user and item embeddings for recommendation
backbone: GNN-based recommender (e.g., LightGCN) with structure distillation
loss: distillation loss + recommendation loss (e.g., BPR) + regularization from personalized imitation weights
key_idea: learn a personalized imitation weight per user to balance old knowledge retention and new data adaptation during incremental training
datasets: five diverse datasets (not named in abstract)
